title: Tender Moment
writer: Michel Boisrond, Claude Brulé, Annette Wademant
actors: Nathalie Delon, Renaud Verley, Katia Christine
plot: Teenage student Olivier (Verley) meets 25 year-old Frédérique (Delon), wife of race car driver Enrico (Hossein), and start an affair. But guilt and doubt storm over Olivier's mind.
